content.text:
Looking at the image, the car is on the gravel/grass area to the left of the track, with the dark asphalt visible to the right - the car needs to steer right to get back onto the track.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 117, target = (117 + 5) % 121 = 122 % 121 = 1 (WP index 1 wraps to 1... wait: 117+5=122, 122%121=1)
- Target WP1: x=3.2095, y=0.6831
- Car: x=2.7718, y=0.9951, heading=10.409°
- dy = 0.6831 - 0.9951 = -0.3120
- dx = 3.2095 - 2.7718 = 0.4377
- bearing = atan2(-0.3120, 0.4377) = -35.44°
- delta = -35.44° - 10.409° = -45.85°
- Normalize: -45.85° → waypoint is to the RIGHT → negative steering

Delta = -45.85°, sharp right correction needed. Car is still far left (y=0.995 vs centerline y=0.683), distance_from_center=0.312m. Previous -25° steering hasn't moved the car back yet — continue maximum right correction.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car remains far left on gravel (y=0.995 vs centerline y=0.683, dist=0.312m) with delta=-45.85° to target waypoint, requiring continued maximum right steering to return to asphalt.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.683 on this straight section; car y~0.995 means car is far left of center",
    "Car has been persistently left of center (y: 0.980→0.994→0.995) — correction very slow",
    "When delta > 40°, use speed=0.75 and steering=-25 for maximum correction",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "Once delta < 5°, switch to 0 steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Progress 98.4% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Car is on gravel/grass edge — need maximum right correction now",
    "Heading ~10° but need to go to ~-35° bearing — large negative delta persists"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.605, 2.704, 2.772],
    "y": [0.980, 0.994, 0.995],
    "yaw": [14.78, 12.97, 10.41]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP1 at (3.210, 0.683): dy=-0.312, dx=0.438, bearing=-35.44°, delta=-45.85° → sharp right correction needed",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
